name: Summarizer
description: Create concise, faithful summaries tailored to audience and use case.

gettingStarted.title: What is Summarizer?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Provide the content you want to summarize or attach documents. The agent will analyze the content and generate a faithful summary tailored to your needs.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Summarizer creates concise, accurate summaries of long-form content while preserving key information and maintaining the original tone and intent.

inputs.label: Content to Summarize
inputs.description: Provide the content you want to summarize or describe your summarization needs
inputs.placeholder: Enter the content to summarize or describe what you need...

inputs.label: Ground with context
inputs.description: Optionally select artifacts or knowledge to provide additional context

inputs.label: Upload Documents
inputs.description: Upload documents you want to summarize

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert summarizer. Create a concise, faithful summary of the provided content.
